emergency_routing_rules: After hours emergency calls routed to Ben directly
non_emergency_routing_rules: AI receptionist gathers details and notifies Ben via dashboard/email
call_transfer_rules: Preferred customers and contractors may bypass AI and call Ben directly
after_hours_flow_summary: AI answers calls, collects customer information, schedules jobs for next business day unless emergency for property managers
office_hours_flow_summary: AI answers calls, collects caller name, phone number, job description and scheduling preferences then sends details to dashboard and Ben
questions_or_unknowns: Detailed call transfer timeouts not specified
notes: Owner: Ben Penoyer. Approximately 20–50 calls per week. Team includes 3 journeymen electricians and subcontractors. Uses Jobber CRM.
